name: Review design package and mark datums
tool: Calipers, square, marking knife, center punch
checks: All stock dimensions exceed finished dimensions plus allowance; Units match drawings

name: Prepare bore blank
checks: Blank straightness checked; Grain direction marked

name: Create bore
tool: Long brad-point bit, reamer, or ball/end mill for split blank
workholding: Tailstock vise/carrier or flip jig with datum pins
checks: Bore wander checked on scrap; Bore diameter measured at both ends
notes: Use the deep-bore technique reference when the bore is long and straight.

name: Cut tone features
machine: CNC router / drill press / laser template
tool: 1/8 in upcut spiral, brad-point bits, or printed drill guide
checks: Hole spacing matches scale table; Undercut/tuning allowance left

name: Validation and tuning pass
tool: Chromatic tuner, calipers, scale, recording device
datum: Same acoustic datum used in design.md
checks: Measured frequency recorded; Cents error computed; Tuning trim notes written
